source.name: Lab 5.2: Testing the Transfer Flow (Completion Check)
source.instructions: Run the assessment to verify your Level 4 bot has domain, action file, flow file, and a trained model.
source.guidance: The completion check verifies: (1) domain has transfer slots and ask responses and action_process_transfer, (2) action_process_transfer.py exists and reads the three slots, (3) transfer_money.yml exists with the three collect steps and action step, (4) a model file exists in level4/models/. If any check fails, complete the corresponding lab and re-run training if needed, then run this assessment again.
